title: Operations
description: Cross-portfolio view of providers, renewals, action queue, and operational health. This is the panel to open weekly.
noteBody: Today this is fed by your internal records. Later, GitHub, Netlify, Cloudflare, and uptime checks can populate the same fields automatically.

copy.renewalsEmpty: No domain or SSL expiries on file. Add a domainExpiry / sslExpiry to each project to enable renewal tracking.
copy.actionQueueEmpty: Nothing in the queue. The team is clear.
copy.setupHealthHint: Records below 60% are flagged. Add the missing fields so this site is fully operationally trackable.
